critic_raw:
The task prompt appears to be corrupted — it references '[FULL CORRUPTED NARRATIVE AS COPY FROM STAGE 3]' and contains no actual methodology content beyond a title and fragment of an introduction sentence. There is no experimental design, no model specification, no data description, no evaluation protocol, and no baseline comparison to evaluate. The placeholder text explicitly acknowledges the content is missing.

This is not a case where I can identify methodological flaws because there is no methodology present. The prompt is a template shell with the substantive content omitted. Rendering a verdict on methodology that does not exist would itself be a methodological error — I would be critiquing a null object.

The only honest assessment is that the submission is incomplete and cannot be evaluated.
all_issues_raised: The methodology description is entirely absent — the prompt contains only a corrupted placeholder and cannot be evaluated for methodological soundness.
all_issues_adjudicated: The methodology description is entirely absent — the prompt contains only a corrupted placeholder and cannot be evaluated for methodological soundness.
